steps.title: Keep the main clause intact
steps.content: The core sentence is that the researchers aimed to shed light on variation in bird eggs. The blank sits inside a modifying phrase set off by commas, so it should describe what the researchers were doing without adding another main verb.

steps.title: Use a participial modifier
steps.content: Choice B gives an awkward infinitive purpose phrase inside the commas. Choice C and Choice D create extra finite verbs instead of modifiers. A present participial phrase correctly modifies the researchers while preserving the main clause. The answer is A.
